predictions.recommendation: Schedule inspection for Engine oil soon.
predictions.explanation: For Engine oil, model maintenance-risk-baseline-v0.1 (random_forest) predicts medium risk: 60/100. Prediction confidence is 74.5%, and the estimated distance until the next service is about 3,503 km. Key reasons: 4500 km since the last service, mixed driving, and similar vehicles in the demo dataset support this risk level.
